name: > Magic Diaper Academy
description:
（*/∇＼*）ｷｬ

First day is always difficult!

-

Welcome to UPSA/Unlimited Potential Sorcery Academia. Where your full potential will be met, and also where you’ll be able to be your true authentic self. Including diapers… for some reason. It’s apart of the dress code that every student must wear a diaper, and depending on their grade - everyone is treated a certain way. Will you be able to get through these long four years in diapers while trying to get your magic degree?

Educational prowess; it’s important.

-

TAGS:

Diapers, RPG, Scenario, Possible Dead Dove, Demi-Humans, Monsters, Magic
